value.stringValue: Mining, Quarrying and Oil and Gas Extraction

Flow.description:
Updated "TextSub" template to not include the two

tags that aren't in Prod.
Flow.label: Screen Flow - Perm Disclaimer Form

fields.name: Heading2
fields.fieldText:
Current Employment

In order to aid us in finding you a suitable opportunity we would like to find out more about your current employment, if you are not currently employed please use details from your most recent employment.

fields.name: What_company_are_you_employed_by
fields.fieldText: What company are you employed by?

fields.name: What_is_your_current_Job_Title
fields.fieldText: What is your current Job Title?

fields.name: What_is_your_reason_for_leaving
fields.fieldText: What is your reason for leaving?

fields.name: What_is_your_annual_salary
fields.fieldText: What is your annual salary?

fields.name: Do_you_have_any_current_benefits
fields.fieldText: Do you have any current benefits? (Bonus, Dental, Healthcare etc.)

value.stringValue: What is your current Notice Period?

fields.name: BA_Privacy_policy2
fields.fieldText: For further details on how we use and store your data please review our privacy notice.

value.stringValue: Please provide us with an up to date copy of your CV if not yet provided

fields.name: Heading1
fields.fieldText:
Your Ideal Job

In order for us to find your ideal next opportunity please let us know a little more information by filling out the questions below:

fields.name: What_is_your_preferred_Job_Title
fields.fieldText: What is your preferred Job Title?

fields.name: What_Sector_s_would_you_like_to_work_in
fields.fieldText: What Sector(s) would you like to work in?

fields.name: What_are_your_preferred_working_arrangements
fields.fieldText: What are your preferred working arrangements’?

value.stringValue: What Sub-sector(s) would you like to work in?

fields.name: Do_you_have_a_valid_Driving_Licence
fields.fieldText: Do you have a valid Driving Licence

fields.name: Do_you_have_your_own_form_of_transportation
fields.fieldText: Do you have your own form of transportation?

fields.name: How_far_would_you_commute
fields.fieldText: How far would you commute?
fields.helpText: For example, 45 Minutes or 30 Miles

fields.name: What_would_be_your_preferred_Town_City_to_work_in
fields.fieldText: What would be your preferred Town/City to work in?

fields.name: Would_you_be_willing_to_relocate
fields.fieldText: Would you be willing to relocate?

fields.name: Would_you_live_in_on_site
fields.fieldText: Would you live in on site?

fields.name: What_is_your_minimum_yearly_salary_expectation
fields.fieldText: What is your minimum yearly salary expectation?

fields.name: Do_you_have_any_benefit_expectations_Bonus_Dental_Healthcare_etc
fields.fieldText: Do you have any benefit expectations? (Bonus, Dental, Healthcare etc.)

fields.name: What_is_your_current_interview_availability
fields.fieldText: For attending interviews, how much notice would you need? If any days/times are usually better please let us know below

fields.name: What_is_your_ideal_working_pattern
fields.fieldText: What is your ideal working pattern?
fields.helpText: For example, 37 hours a week Monday to Friday

fields.name: Let_us_know_any_other_relevant_notes_to_help_us_find_your_ideal_role
fields.fieldText: Let us know any other relevant notes to help us find your ideal role:

fields.name: Heading3
fields.fieldText:
Personal Information

Any medical information captured is considered sensitive data and will be collected, stored and transferred in accordance with our Data Protection policies and procedures. None of this information will be used as part of the job selection process.

fields.name: Are_there_any_reasonable_adjustments_we_need_to_make_if_you_are_selected_for_int
fields.fieldText: Are there any reasonable adjustments we need to make if you are selected for interview?

fields.name: Please_could_you_give_us_the_relevant_details
fields.fieldText: Please could you give us the relevant details:

fields.name: Success2
fields.fieldText:
Success!


Thank you, you will be contacted by one of our consultants if you match the job you applied for or other roles we have. If you are not called, we will keep your details on file and contact you should any other potential roles match your requirements. Also please keep an eye out on our website for any new vacancies that are posted. www.bluearrow.co.uk
